title: Burger Press, Non-Stick Meat Patty Hamburger Maker for Making Quarter Lb or Large 1/3 Pound Stuffed Pocket Burgers, Aluminum for BBQ Grill (100 Wax Paper)
features: SUPER DURABLE: Food-grade aluminum, the mold of this burger press is made of thick die-cast aluminum alloy and coted with food safe material, the handle of this burger press is detachable,can suffer accident falling without being broken.

EASY TO USE: No more mess and fuss shaping burgers by hand, makes uniformed compact burgers easily, round-shape molds with grid pattern will make professional looked grooves and to adjust perfect thickness of a burger in seconds.

EASY TO CLEAN: Benefit from the non-stick property, this patty press is very easy to be cleaned by hand. This burger patty mold is safe to dishwasher, you can put it into a dishwasher for cleaning by the machine.

MULTI-PURPOSE: Besides of making burger patties, this hamburger patty maker is also can be used as a mini frying pan to cook meatballs, meats, pork, beef, fish, etc., and as a gadget for barbeque, roast or grill.
Non-stick cast aluminum, 100% free parchment paper included, which makes releasing the burger from the press a breeze, also can be used for BBQ
description: Product Description DIY Hamburger by Yourself Enjoy the weekend, barbecue with your family and friends ! Burgers are always good choice for barbecue. This burger press is perfect for making burgers ! And it’s also a nice gift for who loves burgers, barbecue and camping ! 4.5inch Burger Press Non Stick Hamburger Patty Maker Mold for BBQ Grill, Home, Parties, Picnic, Patty Maker This burger press has perfect shape and burgers complete with grooves for the professional burger look, You can choose according to your tastes kind meatloaf, thickness up to about 1CM. Simply load the burger maker with meat, fish or a veggie mixture and press down the handle to produce a perfect thick round burger! The patty maker molds were made of high-quality food-grade metal, it can even be used as a roast plate and heated directly. The surface of the product has a non-stick coating, and it is quite convenient to clean the barbecue. This patty maker has a solid wood handle, which is heat-insulating and anti-scalding. 4 STEPS TO USE Put a piece of wax paper into the plate - Start making your own burgers ! Load the meat. Put another piece of paper on the meat. Press, grill it to perfect, enjoy your burgers!You can also make a batch of them and store them in the freezer ! NON-STICK COATING: This Burger Press Hamburger Maker with a high-quality non-stick coating. So, whether it's minced beef or pork and breadcrumbs, or mashed potatoes. it will immediately release them. PARCHMENT PAPER: Burger Circular Papers for non-stick easy separation of burger patties. Set of 100 pieces - 4.5 Inch diameter SHAPED AND COMPACTED: Did you tried making a burger by hand? They'll often spread and break as they cook, leaving you with an uneven mess, This beef burger maker stops this from happening. It compacts your ingredients into a tight, thick but stable patty, and sit superbly on a burger bun. SIZE IS EVERYTHING: Our burger stamp help you make your burgers will come out evenly shaped and sized, every time. Unevenly sized burgers can be result in unevenly cooked results and a potential health threat. It's a risk that's not worth taking. EASY to CLEAN: This burger press is easy to clean makes barbecuing a joy and not a chore! Simply place in a dishwasher or rinse under warm water ready for another burger session! Specification: Material: Food Grade Aluminum Alloy Product size: 4.5 * 0.8 inches ( Inner Diameter * Depth ) Package: Burger Press * 1 Wax Papers * 100 PCS
